profilePrivacyPolicy.title: Instamint Privacy Policy
profilePrivacyPolicy.intro1: Instamint privacy policy will explain how our organization uses the personal data we collect from you when you use our website, Instamint mobile and web app.
profilePrivacyPolicy.intro2: This privacy policy is made using the GPDR compliant privacy notice and the template provided by them (source).
profilePrivacyPolicy.topics2: How do we collect your data?
profilePrivacyPolicy.topics3: How will we use your data?
profilePrivacyPolicy.topics4: How do we store your data?
profilePrivacyPolicy.topics6: What are your data protection rights?
profilePrivacyPolicy.topics9: What types of cookies do we use?
profilePrivacyPolicy.topics14: How to contact the appropriate authorities
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataCollected1: Personal identification information (Name, email address, phone number, etc.)
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataCollectionTitle: How do we collect your data?
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataCollectionIntro: You directly provide Instamint with most of the data we collect. We collect data and process data when you:
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataCollection1: Register online or place an order for any of our products or services.
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataCollection2: Voluntarily complete a customer survey or provide feedback on any of our message boards or via email.
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataCollection3: Use or view our website via your browser’s cookies.
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataCollection5: Provide profile information (photo, bio, phone number).
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataUsageTitle: How will we use your data?
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataUsageIntro: Instamint collects your data so that we can:
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataUsage1: Process your order and manage your account.
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataUsage2: Email you with special offers on other products and services we think you might like.
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataUsage3: Create and manage NFTs from your uploaded images.
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataUsage4: Manage your profile settings (public/private), photo, and bio.
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataUsageNote: We do not plan to share your data with any third party. For example, a partner company.
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataStorageTitle: How do we store your data?
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataStorageIntro: Instamint securely stores your data in the following ways:
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataStorage1: Images: Stored in an AWS S3 bucket with appropriate security measures, including encryption and access controls.
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataStorage2: Database: Stored in a PostgreSQL database hosted in the Azure Cloud, with regular backups (with shadow database for migrations) and robust security protocols.
profilePrivacyPolicy.dataStorageDuration: Instamint will keep your data for 6 months. Once this time period has expired, we will anonymize your data by removing all personally identifiable information, ensuring that the data cannot be linked back to you.
profilePrivacyPolicy.marketingIntro: We don't provide for the moment any marketing services. If we do in the future, we would like to send you information about products and services of ours that we think you might like, as well as those of our partner companies. When we do, we will ask for your consent to receive marketing information directly in the application.
profilePrivacyPolicy.rightsTitle: What are your data protection rights?
profilePrivacyPolicy.rightsIntro: Instamint would like to make sure you are fully aware of all of your data protection rights. Every user is entitled to the following:
profilePrivacyPolicy.rights1: The right to access – You have the right to request Instamint for copies of your personal data. We may charge you a small fee for this service.
profilePrivacyPolicy.rights2: The right to rectification – You have the right to request that Instamint correct any information you believe is inaccurate. You also have the right to request Instamint to complete the information you believe is incomplete.
profilePrivacyPolicy.rights3: The right to erasure – You have the right to request that Instamint erase your personal data, under certain conditions.
profilePrivacyPolicy.rights4: The right to restrict processing – You have the right to request that Instamint restrict the processing of your personal data, under certain conditions.
profilePrivacyPolicy.rights5: The right to object to processing – You have the right to object to Instamint’s processing of your personal data, under certain conditions.
profilePrivacyPolicy.rights6: The right to data portability – You have the right to request that Instamint transfer the data that we have collected to another organization, or directly to you, under certain conditions.
profilePrivacyPolicy.rightsNote: If you make a request, we have one month to respond to you. If you would like to exercise any of these rights, please contact us at our email:
profilePrivacyPolicy.cookiesIntro: Cookies are text files placed on your computer to collect standard Internet log information and visitor behavior information. When you visit our websites, we may collect information from you automatically through cookies or similar technology.
profilePrivacyPolicy.cookiesUsageIntro: We currently use cookies for the following purposes:
profilePrivacyPolicy.cookiesUsage1: Authentication: To keep you signed in
profilePrivacyPolicy.cookiesUsage2: Security: To monitor and prevent security threats
profilePrivacyPolicy.cookiesUsage3: Preferences: To remember your settings and preferences
profilePrivacyPolicy.cookiesTypesTitle: What types of cookies do we use?
profilePrivacyPolicy.cookiesTypesIntro: There are a number of different types of cookies, however, our website uses:
profilePrivacyPolicy.cookiesTypes1: Functionality – Instamint uses these cookies so that we recognize you on our website and remember your previously selected preferences. These could include what language you prefer and location you are in. A mix of first-party and third-party cookies are used.
profilePrivacyPolicy.cookiesTypes2: Advertising – Instamint does not use these cookies in a marketing context for the moment, we will update this policy and ask for your consent if we do in the future.
profilePrivacyPolicy.cookiesManagementIntro: You can set your browser not to accept cookies, and the above website tells you how to remove cookies from your browser. However, in a few cases, some of our website features may not function as a result.
profilePrivacyPolicy.externalPoliciesIntro: Instamint website does not contain, for the moment, links to other websites. Our privacy policy applies only to our website, so if you click on a link to another website, you should read their privacy policy.
profilePrivacyPolicy.policyChangesIntro: Instamint keeps its privacy policy under regular review and places any updates on this web page. This privacy policy was last updated on 2023-05-22.
profilePrivacyPolicy.contactUsIntro: If you have any questions about Instamint’s privacy policy, the data we hold on you, or you would like to exercise one of your data protection rights, please do not hesitate to contact us.
profilePrivacyPolicy.contactAuthoritiesTitle: How to contact the appropriate authorities
profilePrivacyPolicy.contactAuthoritiesIntro: Should you wish to report a complaint or if you feel that the Instamint team has not addressed your concern in a satisfactory manner, you may contact the Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés (CNIL).

uploadOriginalContentTerms.title: Terms of Original content Upload
uploadOriginalContentTerms.firstParagraph: Instamint will store your original uploaded files content for the purpose of creating NFTs. By uploading files, you agree that you have the right to use and distribute these files. Instamint will not use your files for any purpose other than NFT creation without your explicit consent.
uploadOriginalContentTerms.secondParagraph: Instamint reserves the right to remove any content that violates our Terms of Service or infringes on the rights of others. Please ensure your files meet our content guidelines before uploading.
uploadOriginalContentTerms.contactInfo: If you have any questions about how your files content will be used, please review our Privacy Policy or contact us at
